title.en: 2x2 Pyramorphix Tutorial 二阶粽子魔方教程

content.en:
2x2 Pyramorphix Tutorial 二阶粽子魔方教程

1. Solve shape

2. CP

reference corner, put it on F.

do L, R, B. solve second corner. solve L2CP.

3. Centers

First Center: D->B

B2 R2 L2 R2

L3X

+: L' R B2 L R'

-: R L' B2 R' L

L<->R: R2 L B2 R L2 B'

4. Corner Twist

in U

+: (R L' R' L)2 = z (R U' R' U)2 z'

-: (L' R L R')2 = z' (U' R U R')2 z
